caseTitle: Maria Sandoval — Polyarthritis with hair loss
_status_notes: Skeleton only. Questions, rubrics, AI-generation prompts, and grader prompts are placeholders. Fill in rubric content during Phase 2 chart-building sessions.
description: 5-assessment diagnostic and management simulation testing resident-AI collaboration on a complex multi-system case adapted from NEJM Clinical Problem-Solving 'Peeling and Plummeting' (2024). The case spans 2 years and is designed to expose how residents select context, frame questions to AI, and recognize AI errors under realistic chart overwhelm.
warning: Allow at least 90 minutes uninterrupted. Pausing is permitted but stops the timer.
instructions: You are evaluating a real patient. Use the chart and the AI assistant as you normally would. Each prompt asks you to either answer a clinical question, describe your AI usage, or critique an AI-generated response. Your responses are graded by an AI grader; AI usage patterns are recorded for review. The diagnosis is revealed only at the end.
